description: High-resolution PNGs extracted from the fan-made Sorcerer's Cave conversion kit PDFs. Naming is positional (sheet + slot); semantic mapping to game-engine entity ids is a follow-up step.

extraction.method: pdfimages (native embedded JPEGs); soft-masks composited to RGBA for tokens
extraction.notes: Area tiles are LANDSCAPE: rotated -90 (CCW) so the double-headed direction arrow points up in the NW (top-left) corner. Small cards & STONE/CURSE markers were stored sideways and rotated -90 to upright portrait. Token print-duplicates de-duplicated by md5.

tiles.description: Area tiles (large cards, 88x126mm), LANDSCAPE with NW direction arrow up. Categorized by connected-component analysis of the art: exits (N/E/S/W edges reached by the main tunnel/chamber; disconnected edge stubs are NOT exits), tileType (chamber/tunnel/gateway), and special (5 named tiles). 22 chambers + 1 gateway + 37 tunnels. Stair up/down pending.

cards.description: Small cards: creatures, treasures, artifacts, hazards (63x88mm), upright portrait. Each card identified by its yellow name banner: name + category (creature/treasure/hazard) + engine entityId (null for the optional Sybil variant). 38 creatures + 27 treasures + 7 hazards.

secretDoorsLarge.description: Lettered secret-door markers A-Z, large (RGBA). Not modelled in the solitaire engine.
